headline: Mexico's ECA LNG terminal to begin production in June, Sempra says
summary: US energy firm Sempra expects its Energia Costa Azul liquefied natural gas export terminal in Ensenada, Baja Californiato begin production in June, ahead of reaching substantialcompletion this...
